calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Continued To Aug-13-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Seal Portions Of The Record
Off Calendar Apr-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Kimberly Dennis, Esq. of Dentons, Tel. 480.570.1909, specially appearing for Defendant Slower, LLC;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF AECUS LAW, P.C.'s Motion To Seal Portions Of The Record.

Matter called, no argument is held. Ms. Dennis states that she is here just to make sure the Court doesn't have questions. The Court states that counsel should follow the procedures in the tentative ruling, and adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's stipulated motion to seal is granted. There is good cause to seal the name of the employee cited in the attachments to the complaint and settlement agreement to protect his privacy rights. The request is narrowly tailored and the motion meets the requirements of CRC 2.550(d). In fact, plaintiff could have unilaterally redacted that information because it was not necessary to the disposition of the case (which has settled) and the court did not need to rely on the information to render a ruling. In any event, the moving party shall prepare an order that makes the findings per CRC 2.550(d) and submit redacted copies of the filings to the clerk's office no later than close of business on May 8, 2024.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Bailiff: Jamie; Not Reported. (302/RCE)
